summary: Re-anchored the opening on Lena rechecking her phone so the chapter picks up more directly from chapter 03's closing beat and no longer mirrors chapter 05's 'By [time]' opening scaffold. The chapter ending already handed cleanly into the next day's date-prep anxiety, so it was left intact.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to start on Lena checking her phone again, linking the chapter entry to the prior chapter's final text exchange.
Removed the matching 'By [time]' opening construction so chapter 04 enters on a distinct scaffold from chapter 05.
